data.title: Hacker Group Threatens Cyberattacks On Elon Musk's Empire Throughout April, After Dropping Trump Focus: Report
data.description: The infamous hacking group, DonRoad Team, has reportedly disclosed its intentions to execute a series of cyberattacks on websites linked to Elon Musk throughout April.

data.title: Ford, GM To Witness 'Higher Demand' As American Carmakers Set To 'Reap The Fruit Of Protectionism,' Says Expert: Here's A List Of Potential Gainers And Losers From Trump Tariffs
data.description: Despite Donald Trump's tariffs sending shockwaves through the market, one analyst believes the domestic automotive industry will benefit.

data.title: Palantir Co-Founder Joe Lonsdale Asks If China Is Dumping Treasuries As Yields Spike: Tesla Director Kimbal Musk Says Beijing Playing 'Fed-Chicken' With Trump Ahead Of $6.5 Trillion Debt Refinancing Deadline
data.description: Palantir Technologies co-founder Joe Lonsdale flagged unusual market activity on Tuesday, questioning whether China is "dumping treasuries like mad" amid escalating trade tensions with the U.S.

data.title: FatPipe Stock Rips 126% On Nasdaq Debut Before Paring Some Gains After-Hours
data.description: FatPipe shares skyrocketed 126.08% to $13.00 from their initial public offering price of $5.75 per share during their Nasdaq debut, before sliding 20.77% to $10.30 in after-hours trading.

data.title: Meta Restricts Live Streaming For Teens Under 16 As Part Of Expanded Safety Measures
data.description: Meta Platforms announced new restrictions for teen users, prohibiting those under 16 from live streaming on Instagram without parental permission, as the company expands its Teen Account protections across its platforms.
